text_excerpt: News | Julia Lopez Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Julia Lopez My Plan Campaigns News In Parliament Contact GALLOWS CORNER UPDATES News VISITING THE ROYAL BRITISH LEGION IN UPMINSTER Wednesday, 29 April, 2026 Last week, Julia was invited to the Royal British Legion in Upminster to unveil their commemorative plaque, celebrating those who helped contribute to the restoration of their roof. Find out how she got on in the video above. Local News UPDATE ON GALLOWS CORNER DELAYS 28th April 2026 As promised, I met TfL and Essex & Suffolk Water to get more info on what’s caused the delay to the reopening of Gallows Corner and what happens next. The... Local News JULIA LOPEZ MP TO HOST FREE OLDER PEOPLE’S FAIR AT QUEEN’S THEATRE HORNCHURCH 28th April 2026 Julia Lopez MP is inviting residents to attend her free Older People’s Fair at Queen’s Theatre Hornchurch next Tuesday. The event will take place from 9.30am to... Local News JULIA LOPEZ MP AND STUART ANDREW MP JOIN LOBULAR MOON SHOT PROJECT IN CALLING ON GOVERNMENT TO FUND RESEARCH INTO UK’S SECOND MOST COMMON BREAST CANCER 23rd April 2026 Shadow Ministers meet campaigners ahead of vigils outside DSIT and Number 10 Downing Street, urging Labour to honour Conservative commitment to fund basic... Articles GOVERNMENT VOTES AGAINST PROTECTING CHILDREN FROM HARMFUL SOCIAL MEDIA 23rd April 2026 Yesterday the Government voted against protecting children from harmful social media. Watch Julia's reaction and find out what this means at the video above. Articles BLUE PLAQUE CELEBRATES RAF HERITAGE IN HORNCHURCH 17th April 2026 Yesterday, Julia attended the unveiling of a blue plaque at the Hornchurch Heritage Centre, celebrating the RAF's heritage at the site and the role it played in... Local News JULIA HAMMERS GOVERNMENT FOR LOSS OF AI INVESTMENT 16th April 2026 This week, Julia has been hammering the Government over their loss of important AI investment from the UK. Find out more in the video above. Articles JULIA LOPEZ CONTINUES TO PRESS GOVERNMENT ON UPMINSTER STEP FREE ACCESS 15th April 2026 Julia Lopez MP has continued to press the Government over its decision not to proceed with funding for step free works at Upminster Station. Mrs Lopez has... Local News OLDER PEOPLE’S FAIR TO RETURN TO HORNCHURCH THIS MAY 31st March 2026 Hornchurch & Upminster MP Julia Lopez has announced that her Older People’s Fair will take place on Tuesday 5 May from 9.30am to 12.30pm at Queen’s Theatre...
